title: AI GM - Campaign Story Reader v2 (SQL)

list.name: campaign_id
list.query: SELECT CAST(id AS TEXT) AS __value, CAST(id AS TEXT) AS __text FROM campaigns ORDER BY id DESC;

panels.title: Story DB — not live
panels.description: Grafana reads a SQLite file copied to the observability VM. Re-querying does not pull from the running game.

options.content:
## Campaign story in Grafana is a **snapshot**, not live play

- Inside Grafana the file is always mounted at **`/var/lib/ai-gm-db/ai_gm.db`** (`sqlite-story.yml`). On the host that is usually `AI_GM_STORY_DB_DIR` (e.g. `…/observability-data/story-db`).
- **Cron `scripts/db-autosync.sh`** copies `docker cp …/ai_gm.db` there (atomic `mv`). If turn counts look stale: check `/tmp/ai-gm-db-sync.log`, run sync once by hand, then **hard-refresh** this dashboard (or restart Grafana if the SQLite plugin still shows an old snapshot).

**One-shot sync (same host as backend):**

```bash
SYNC_TRANSPORT=local REMOTE_DB_DIR=/home/YOU/ai-gm/observability-data/story-db ./scripts/db-autosync.sh
```

**Remote observability VM:** use `observability/sync_story_db_to_observability.sh` or `OBS_HOST=… ./scripts/db-autosync.sh` with SSH.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM campaigns) AS campaigns_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM campaign_turns) AS turns_count;
targets.queryText: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM campaigns) AS campaigns_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM campaign_turns) AS turns_count;

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT id AS campaign_id, title, system_id, model_id, language, mode, status, created_at FROM campaigns WHERE id = CAST(${campaign_id:raw} AS INTEGER);
targets.queryText: SELECT id AS campaign_id, title, system_id, model_id, language, mode, status, created_at FROM campaigns WHERE id = CAST(${campaign_id:raw} AS INTEGER);

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS turns FROM campaign_turns WHERE campaign_id = CAST(${campaign_id:raw} AS INTEGER);
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS turns FROM campaign_turns WHERE campaign_id = CAST(${campaign_id:raw} AS INTEGER);

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT t.turn_number, c.title AS campaign_title, ch.name AS character_name, t.route, t.created_at, t.user_text, t.assistant_text FROM campaign_turns t LEFT JOIN campaigns c ON c.id = t.campaign_id LEFT JOIN characters ch ON ch.id = t.character_id WHERE t.campaign_id = CAST(${campaign_id:raw} AS INTEGER) ORDER BY t.turn_number ASC;
targets.queryText: SELECT t.turn_number, c.title AS campaign_title, ch.name AS character_name, t.route, t.created_at, t.user_text, t.assistant_text FROM campaign_turns t LEFT JOIN campaigns c ON c.id = t.campaign_id LEFT JOIN characters ch ON ch.id = t.character_id WHERE t.campaign_id = CAST(${campaign_id:raw} AS INTEGER) ORDER BY t.turn_number ASC;
